title: crotalaria goiasensis
intro: Crotalaria goiasensis, also known as Goias rattlebox, is a flowering plant species in the legume family Fabaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, respiratory issues, and gastrointestinal problems. The health benefits of Crotalaria goiasensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, act as an antimicrobial agent, and possess antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, Crotalaria goiasensis is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal benefits, although its use should be done under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional due to potential toxicity.
